projects.title: Quiz Builder Platform
projects.description: SaaS-style form and quiz platform built with Next.js App Router and Supabase. Focused on pleasant UX, scalable application architecture, reusable UI system and best React/Next.js practices.

projects.title: YNA Client
projects.description: Delivered a large-scale visual and technical refresh of business-critical registration, donation and e-commerce journeys across a multi-site platform powering 80+ websites. Implemented frontend architecture improvements and performance optimizations supporting both end users and content editors.

projects.title: Craft CMS Export Feeds Plugin
projects.description: Designed and implemented UI for an extensible export plugin supporting Google Merchant, Facebook and Channable integrations.
